atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a promotional end card for a cooking channel.
The text 'Subscribe for further recipes' is positioned at the top of the frame.
The text 'Check out our e-books' is positioned at the bottom of the frame.
Two book covers are displayed side-by-side in the center.
Amazon logos indicate the books are available on that platform.
A Facebook logo is visible on the right side.

ocr: RECIPES AND TRIVIA FROM A CULINARY MISCREANT
spatial: The grid of food images is located at the top of the screen, above the text 'Subscribe for further recipes'. The two book covers are positioned in the center, between the Amazon logos and the Facebook logo. The text 'Check out our e-books' is located at the very bottom of the screen, below all other elements.
